decisions.decision: Do not include --force-prefers-reduced-motion in ReducedUiControls because visible thinking/loading animation is required.
Keep the worker check_ai_slop guardrail changes and extend them with tool-gap fallback validation on the main thread.
Remove only inactive Documents\Codex trusted project entries from user Codex config and preserve canonical roots/MCP/plugins/analytics settings.
Active delegation now blocks if DELEGATION_DECISION.json is missing or invalid.
Requested priority/GPU mitigation failures now become WARN/BLOCKED instead of hidden PASS.
